title: Garlicky, Crispy Brazilian Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and crispy shrimp dish from Brazil, perfect for a hangover cure. This keto-friendly recipe features a tasty marinade and a side of couscous.

ingredients.name: Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, thawed if frozen

ingredients.name: Brazilian chilies (such as malagueta or piri piri)

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine garlic, cilantro, parsley, lime juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Add the shrimp to a large bowl and pour the marinade over them. Mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook the couscous according to package instructions using 1 cup of water.
To serve, place a few skewers on a plate and serve with a side of couscous and a squeeze of orange juice.
Optional: Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges.
